view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The step aimed to validate the scenario of copying settings from one business to another, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how this functionality is implemented or verified through API interactions. While the expected result mentions a clear, actionable failure report, the lack of specific API reads or persisted state checks means we cannot confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or not. Therefore, the requirement is not satisfied, indicating a gap in the evidence provided.
